name: Major Air Routes
description: The world's busiest flight corridors and major airports — global air connectivity at a glance

name: Ancient Civilizations
description: Explore where humanity's earliest complex societies flourished, from Mesopotamia to Mesoamerica. Region polygons show territorial extent while point markers highlight major archaeological sites. Data sourced from Pleiades Gazetteer and historical-basemaps.

name: Biodiversity Hotspots
description: Conservation International's 36 global biodiversity hotspots — regions with exceptional concentrations of endemic species facing exceptional habitat loss

name: Biomes & Ecosystems
description: Earth's major biomes and ecoregions based on the WWF classification system

name: Climate Zones (Köppen-Geiger)
description: Global climate classification zones based on the Köppen-Geiger system

name: Coral Reefs
description: Global distribution of major coral reef systems — barrier reefs, fringing reefs, and atolls with health status and conservation data sourced from UNEP-WCMC

name: Cuisine & Food Culture Regions
description: Major world culinary regions showcasing how geography shapes food culture

name: World Currencies
description: Geographic distribution of world currencies and monetary systems

name: Desertification & Arid Zones
description: Global desertification and aridity zones based on UNCCD/CGIAR aridity index data and the UN Environment World Atlas of Desertification — colored by aridity classification from hyper-arid to dry sub-humid

name: Endangered Species Habitats
description: Range polygons for ~200 iconic endangered species colored by IUCN Red List status, sourced from IUCN spatial data (curated subset)

name: Festivals & Celebrations
description: Major cultural festivals and celebrations worldwide — religious, cultural, seasonal, and national celebrations curated from UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage list and major world events

name: Historical Empires
description: Boundaries of major historical empires at their peak territorial extent, sourced from aourednik/historical-basemaps. Explore how political power has shaped the world across millennia.

name: Indigenous Territories
description: Traditional territorial boundaries of indigenous peoples worldwide, sourced from Native Land Digital

name: Internet Connectivity Speed
description: Global broadband and mobile internet speeds by country

name: World Languages
description: Geographic regions of world languages

name: Light Pollution
description: Global light pollution levels based on the New World Atlas of Artificial Night Sky Brightness (Falchi et al.) — zones colored by Bortle scale class from pristine dark skies to urban glow, with International Dark Sky Places shown as point markers

name: Migration Patterns
description: Global migration patterns — bird flyways rendered as wide semi-transparent polygon corridors and top human migration corridors as arc lines with thickness by volume

name: Traditional Music Regions
description: Explore world music traditions by region, from Blues and Flamenco to Gamelan and Throat Singing. Discover the geography of musical diversity with tradition families, key instruments, notable artists, and UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage status. Data curated from Global Jukebox and Alan Lomax Archive research.

name: Astronomical Observatories
description: Major astronomical observatories worldwide — optical, radio, multi-messenger, and space-based facilities exploring the cosmos

name: Ocean Currents
description: Major ocean currents showing global water circulation patterns — warm, cold, and deep currents with flow direction indicators

name: Power Grid Standards
description: Global electrical standards showing voltage, frequency, and plug types by country

name: Rainforests
description: Global rainforest coverage showing intact forest landscapes — tropical, temperate, and boreal forests with deforestation trends and conservation data sourced from the Intact Forest Landscapes (IFL) 2020 dataset

name: World Religions
description: Geographic distribution of major world religions and faith traditions

name: Shipping Routes & Major Ports
description: Global shipping lanes and major ports — the arteries of international maritime trade

name: Space Launch Sites
description: Space launch facilities worldwide — active, historical, and planned spaceports including government and commercial launch sites

name: Submarine Internet Cables
description: Undersea fiber optic cables connecting continents and islands — the physical backbone of the global internet

name: Tectonic Plates
description: Major and minor tectonic plate boundaries and geological features

name: World Time Zones
description: Global UTC time zones with current local times and DST information

name: Historical Trade Routes
description: Major historical trade routes that connected civilizations — from the Silk Road to Viking sea lanes, tracing the paths of ancient commerce

name: Traditional Medicine Systems
description: Geographic distribution of major traditional and complementary medicine systems worldwide

name: UNESCO World Heritage Sites
description: UNESCO World Heritage Sites — culturally and naturally significant places recognized for their outstanding universal value.

name: Volcanoes
description: Active volcanoes worldwide from the Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program — Holocene volcanoes including stratovolcanoes, shield volcanoes, calderas, and more

name: Water Scarcity Zones
description: Global water stress levels at the sub-basin scale — colored from low to extremely high stress based on WRI Aqueduct 4.0 water risk indicators including depletion rate, drought risk, and seasonal variability

name: Wildfire Risk Zones
description: Global wildfire risk areas based on GWIS/JRC and NASA FIRMS aggregated data — regions colored by fire risk frequency from low to extreme, with major recent fire events shown as point markers

name: Writing Systems
description: Geographic distribution of major writing scripts used around the world

name: Zoomin Groomin Client Zip Codes
description: Service area zip codes for Zoomin Groomin Lowcountry clients in South Carolina
